articles.summary: Iran suspends agreement with Washington after 'US violations' Iran's deputy foreign minister, Kazem Gharibabadi, said Tehran had suspended its commitments to the memorandum of understanding (MoU) with Washington as US attacks continue.  “The US has violated and suspended all its commitments within the framework of the Islamabad MoU,” Gharibabadi said.
